title: MC Dungeons Enchanting
description: Brings the Enchanting system from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) # ![MC Dungeons Enchanting Banner stating the name of the mod as MC Dungeons Enchanting](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_header.webp) ## ![Banner with enchanted Minecraft writing indicating the start of the Compatibility section](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_introduction.webp) ## DISCLAIMER: MC DUNGEONS ENCHANTING **DOES NOT ADD NEW ENCHANTMENTS**. IT ONLY CREATES A NEW WAY TO OBTAIN ALREADY EXISTING ENCHANTMENTS. Now with existance of both MC Dungeons Weapons and MC Dungeons Armor mods for Fabric, the only part of the gear experience of Minecraft Dungeons that's missing is it's unique enchanting system. Well, MC Dungeons Enchanting brings this system into Minecraft Java! The Enchanting table has been removed from the survival gameplay and replaced with it's new version - Runic Table. MC Dungeons Enchanting has integrated support for: - [MC Dungeons Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw) - [MC Dungeons Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda) - [MC Dungeons Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdar) [![Banner indicating sponsorship by Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/backupcup) ## ![Banner with enchanted Minecraft writing indicating the start of the Compatibility section](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_compatibility.webp) With version 1.2.0+ you can add enchantments from other mods yourself through configs and resourcepacks! Please see our [Github page](https://github.com/EndLone/MCDE#compatibility-with-other-mods) for more information about adding compatibility for other mods. ## ![Banner with enchanted Minecraft writing indicating the start of the Main Content section](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_content.webp) MC Dungeons Enchanting adds three new blocks: - Runic Table - the main block, acts as a new enchanting table. Randomly generates a list of enchantments that one Item can take. There are plans to add a Golding Foundry for gilding the weapons/tools/armor. - Roll Bench - an additional block which rerolls a single enchantment per use, costs lapis lazuli. The cost is respective of the level you'd spend to activate this enchantment. - Gilding Foundry - a special block station which will use gold ingots to apply a random permanent enchantment of 1st level to an item (This enchantment will not count towards rerolling or enchanting and also cannot be rerolled or removed). Runic Table recipe: ![An image demonstrating the crafting recipe for the Runic Table](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iwkcspV8/images/1ed1d9e0b882ee2e47b0bef6417681e6c35e36f7.png) Roll Bench recipe: ![An image demonstrating the crafting recipe for the Roll Bench](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iwkcspV8/images/872c9a194f3a962b966de1578cc17e15398ddeb9.png) Gilding Foundry recipe: ![An image demonstrating the crafting recipe for the Gilding Foundry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iwkcspV8/images/3efec912202d06dbad577fdac1351736d9cea3a6.png) All three blocks have a crafting recipe that show up in EMI, REI and the Vanilla Recipe Book. ## ![Banner with enchanted Minecraft writing indicating the start of the FAQ section](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MC_Dungeons_Enchanting/BH_MCDE_faq.webp) - Q: Why does MCDE not work with Optifine? - A: Optifine's code is closed source and extremely invasive. This is not a bad thing, in and of itself; but it makes it almost impossible to troubleshoot anything whilst still respecting the licencing that sp614x uses. So, out of respect for them so as to not have to explore their code without permission, we simply do not support it. Please consider the following alternatives: - FPS Enhancement and Optimisations -- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Fabric); [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium) (Forge) - Shaders -- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (Fabric); [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) (Forge) - Rendering Compatibility -- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) (Fabric); [Reforgium](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforgium) (Forge) - Q: Can I use your mod in my modpack? - A: Absolutely! I only ask that you provide a link back to this page. - Q: I've seen your mod on other sites. Did you post it and are they safe? - A: I have not, nor do I plan to, post my mod on any other sites than Modrinth, Curseforge or our GitHub page. If you have downloaded this mod from somewhere else: 1. It isn't from us 2. It may have some kind of malicious files or have been modified in some way. I urge you to delete the file, run a full virus and malware scan and, if you want to use MC Dungeons Enchanting, come and download it on Modrinth, CurseForge or from GitHub. - Q: 1.12.2? - A: Given the massive strides that have been made with Minecraft's code since 1.12 and the subsequent changes to the underlying code, a 1.12.x port is simply untenible. Please see this [link](https://howoldisminecraft1122.today/) for more information. - Q: Will the mod be ported to 1.x.x? - A: The mod will be continued to all versions starting from 1.19.2. - Q. Forge? - A. MC Dungeons Enchanting is compatible with Forge by using the following mods: [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras) and the [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) which are being developed by Su5eD. Please make sure to follow all of their instructions in order to have the best experience. ## Localisations/Translations Would you like to have MC Dungeon Enchanting translated into your language? Please submit your translation on the [Github page](https://github.com/EndLone/MCDE) and I'd be glad to add it! - English - `en_us` - BackupCup - Ukranian - `uk_ua` - unroman - Russian - `ru_ru` - Iamnotagenius - Italian - `it_it` - SpadaccinoOscuro ## Attributions/Special Thanks - [Iamnotagenius](https://modrinth.com/user/Iamnotagenius) - For developing most of the logic and code behind this enchanting system. Without him, this mod wouldn't exist. - Krosskaos - For making the project description designs. - [Chronos_Sacaria](https://modrinth.com/user/Chronos_Sacaria) - For partnering up and accepting us into Timefall.
